narrative:
Precinct Powhatan Point Village (precinct in Belmont County) has 869 registered voters, with 62.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a clear Democratic lean of 11.2 percentage points.
